products.name: XGC2 acados
products.summary: System-level acados solver stack and Python code-generation dependencies for XGC2 projects on Ubuntu 20.04, 22.04, and 24.04.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install xgc2-acados
usage.notes:
CMake consumers should use find_package(xgc2_acados REQUIRED CONFIG).
MATLAB users should run /opt/xgc2/acados/setup_acados.m.

products.name: XGC2 Geometry
products.summary: Header-only C++ convex geometry, convex-set, convex-hull, and GJK utilities.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install libxgc2-geometry-dev
usage.notes:
CMake consumers should use find_package(xgc2_geometry REQUIRED CONFIG)
and link xgc2_geometry::geometry. New public headers live under

products.name: XGC2 MAVLink Router
products.summary: XGC2 fork of mavlink-router packaged as a native Debian executable for Ubuntu 20.04, 22.04, and 24.04.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install xgc2-mavlink-router

products.name: XGC2 Observer
products.summary: Header-only C++ observer, differentiator, and signal filtering utilities for XGC2 robotics runtime code.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install libxgc2-observer-dev
usage.notes:
CMake consumers should use find_package(xgc2_observer REQUIRED CONFIG)
and link xgc2_observer::observer. The public include path is
<xgc2_observer/observer.hpp>.

products.name: XGC2 State Machine
products.summary: System-level deterministic C++ state machine development library for XGC2 controllers, planners, and runtime workflows.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install libxgc2-state-machine-dev
usage.notes:
CMake consumers should use find_package(xgc2_state_machine REQUIRED CONFIG)
and link xgc2_state_machine::state_machine. The public include path remains
<state_machine/state_machine.hpp>.

products.name: XGC2 oneTBB
products.summary: System-level oneAPI Threading Building Blocks runtime for XGC2 projects on Ubuntu 20.04, 22.04, and 24.04.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install xgc2-tbb
usage.notes:
CMake consumers should use find_package(xgc2_tbb REQUIRED CONFIG).
The upstream oneTBB CMake package remains available under /opt/xgc2/tbb.

products.name: XGC2 ROS1 Utils
products.summary: ROS1-coupled runtime, scheduling, topic, and control utility helpers for XGC2 controllers.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-ros1-utils

products.name: XGC2 Runtime Sync
products.summary: Runtime synchronization coordinator, weak-network telemetry, and swarm sync core for XGC2 ROS1 multi-agent systems.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-runtime-sync

products.name: XGC2 Controller
products.summary: ROS1 controller packages for XGC2 robots, including multirotor PX4/MAVROS NMPC control and reference trajectory generation.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-controller

products.name: Livox ROS Driver
products.summary: ROS1 Noetic package for the first-generation Livox ROS driver.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-livox-ros-driver

products.name: Livox ROS Driver 2
products.summary: ROS1 Noetic package for Livox ROS Driver 2.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-livox-ros-driver2

products.name: XGC2 Linux Utils
products.summary: ROS Noetic-accessible Linux CPU performance helper scripts for simulation and experiment runs.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-linux-utils
usage.smoke_test:
rospack find linux_performance
rosrun linux_performance print_cpu_frequency.sh

products.name: XGC2 Detection
products.summary: ROS1 perception detection packages including the LV-DOT onboard dynamic obstacle detector.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-detection
usage.smoke_test:
rospack find onboard_detector_lv
rosrun onboard_detector_lv detector_node_lv --help

products.name: XGC2 Hover Thrust Estimator
products.summary: Hover thrust estimation package for PX4/MAVROS UAV controllers.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-estimator-hover-thrust

products.name: XGC2 Rigid State Estimator
products.summary: Rigid-body state estimation package for PX4/MAVROS UAV controllers.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-estimator-rigid-state

products.name: XGC2 Sensor Calibration
products.summary: Sensor calibration core libraries, MATLAB references, and ROS adapters.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-sensor-calibration
usage.smoke_test:
roslaunch --files sensor_calibration ugv_vrpn_cmd_vel_calibration.launch
roslaunch --files sensor_calibration uav_vrpn_mavros_px4_calibration.launch
roslaunch --files sensor_calibration upload_calibration_params.launch

products.name: XGC2 SLAM
products.summary: ROS1 SLAM packages including FAST-LIO2, Swarm-LIO2, Point-LIO, LIO-SAM, and Voxel-SLAM.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-slam
usage.smoke_test:
rospack find fast_lio
rospack find swarm_lio
rospack find point_lio
rospack find lio_sam
rospack find voxel_slam
rospack find voxelslam_pointcloud2

products.name: XGC2 VRPN Router
products.summary: Route VRPN tracker poses into MAVROS vision pose inputs.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-vrpn-router

products.name: XGC2 Planner
products.summary: ROS1 planner packages including GCOPTER, JPS3D, CERLAB UAV Autonomy, Intent-MPC, MADER, Robust MADER, EGO-Planner, and Fast-Planner.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-planner
usage.smoke_test:
rospack find gcopter
rospack find mader
rospack find rmader
rospack find xgc2_cerlab_global_planner
rospack find xgc2_cerlab_tracking_controller
rospack find xgc2_cerlab_trajectory_planner
rospack find xgc2_intent_mpc_trajectory_planner
rospack find xgc2_intent_mpc_autonomous_flight
rospack find ego_planner
rospack find fast_plan_manage

products.name: XGC2 Scene Generation
products.summary: ROS1 scene-generation tools for convex obstacle scenarios and procedural point-cloud maps.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-scene-generation
usage.smoke_test:
rospack find xgc2_geometry_msgs
rospack find cluttered_environment
rospack find mockamap

products.name: XGC2 Gazebo Sim
products.summary: Gazebo Classic simulation meta package for ROS Noetic.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim
usage.notes:
This repository is the verified Gazebo simulation suite entrypoint. Source packages live in child product repositories.
The aggregate package uses minimum child package versions so apt upgrades stale installed children when a quickstart requires newer launch assets.
Child repositories may publish compatible packaging revisions independently; bump this product version only when the aggregate dependency set or compatibility contract changes.
usage.smoke_test:
dpkg -s ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_examples fs150_ugv_vrpn_stack.launch
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_scout simple.launch rviz:=false
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_px4_1_12 iris.launch gui:=false
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_px4_1_14 iris.launch gui:=false
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_fs150_sitl fs150.launch gui:=false

products.name: XGC2 Gazebo Classic Scout
products.summary: AgileX Scout robot description and Gazebo Classic simulation packages for ROS Noetic.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-scout

products.name: XGC2 CERLAB UAV Simulator
products.summary: CERLAB and Intent-MPC Gazebo Classic UAV simulator and plugins for ROS Noetic.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-cerlab-uav
usage.smoke_test:
roslaunch --files xgc2_cerlab_uav_simulator start.launch
roslaunch --files xgc2_cerlab_uav_simulator px4_start.launch

products.name: XGC2 FS150 SITL
products.summary: FS150 PX4 1.12 iris SITL wrapper for Gazebo Classic.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-fs150-sitl

products.name: XGC2 Gazebo Sim Tools
products.summary: Gazebo Classic session manager, examples, and Gazebo-to-VRPN bridge packages for ROS Noetic.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-manager ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-examples ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-vrpn-bridge
usage.notes: These are Gazebo Classic simulation tools. The full suite is installed through ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-all from xgc2-gazebo-sim.
usage.smoke_test:
roslaunch --files gazebo_session_manager session_manager.launch world_name:=/tmp/xgc2-empty.world
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_examples fs150_ugv_vrpn_stack.launch
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_examples fs150_uav1_nmpc_tracking.launch
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_vrpn_bridge vrpn_server.launch auto_track_known_models:=true
roslaunch --files gazebo_sim_vrpn_bridge vrpn_client.launch trackers:=[uav1]

products.name: XGC2 PX4 SITL 1.12
products.summary: PX4 v1.12 SITL runtime and Gazebo Classic assets for ROS Noetic.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-px4-1-12
usage.notes: Runtime entry scripts are installed from package scripts; packaging scripts stay under .xgc2/scripts.

products.name: XGC2 PX4 SITL 1.14
products.summary: PX4 v1.14 SITL runtime and Gazebo Classic assets for ROS Noetic.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-px4-1-14
usage.notes: Runtime entry scripts are installed from package scripts; packaging scripts stay under .xgc2/scripts.

products.name: XGC2 Gazebo Sim Worlds
products.summary: Shared Gazebo Classic world assets for ROS Noetic simulation products.

usage.install:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ros-noetic-xgc2-gazebo-sim-worlds
usage.notes: This product owns reusable world and model assets only. Scenario launch files remain in gazebo_sim_examples.

products.name: XGC2 Swarm Sync Sim
products.summary: Multi-vehicle synchronized simulation packages for ROS Noetic.

products.name: XGC2 PX4 SITL 1.16
